title: Bloom video-first program over loaded clip

metricComparisons.description: bloom program's new temporal-echo post preset adds enough deliberate trailing motion and UV drift that frame-to-frame temporal diff should now rise over the raw video baseline, even though the chain still carries strong feedback persistence

expectedVideo: applying bloom should smear highlights into a warm soft bloom while the new temporal-echo post preset adds visible trailing drift and a faint channel split
expectedAudio: the coupled delay should widen and soften the sound without collapsing the attack
audio side is MANUAL REVIEW ONLY: program-level exported-audio gates land with M5.7-143
manualChecks: Does the bloom read as a warm trailing glow with deliberate temporal drag rather than a generic whole-frame blur?
Does the audio widen audibly without clipping or transient loss?
